title: AutoSmelt
body:
A mod that adds a autosmelt enchantment and lava pickaxe to minecraft it is useful for people that don't like waiting for items to smelt I am working on getting the lava pickaxe to auto enchant with autosmelt. Made in MCreator.


Edit: Going to rewrite it as I lost the code for it, and it will be for newer versions, still will be made in MCreator.
Edit 2: So MCreator removed some of the things I used for it, also after testing, the mod doesn't even work that well.
